flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 45% at Penn Commercial Business/Technical School vs the 2003–2007 baseline (223 vs 403).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Penn Commercial Business/Technical School rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 ($16.0k → $20.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Penn Commercial Business/Technical School rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.1k → $13.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Penn Commercial Business/Technical School vs the 2003–2007 baseline (72.7% vs 81.3%).
